        "analysis_summary": "| Skill | Gap Severity | Importance to Target Job |\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\n| Deep Learning (PyTorch) | High | Essential for building and fine-tuning modern NLP architectures. |\n| Transformers | High | Primary technology used in Junior NLP Engineer production environments. |\n| API Deployment | Medium | Critical for integrating machine learning models into software products. |"
    },
    "project_recommendation": {
        "project_title": "Production-Grade Interaction Transformer: Domain-Specific Relational Mining Engine",
        "objective": "To bridge the gap between academic Python and production NLP engineering by deploying a Transformer-based entity-relationship extraction pipeline.",
        "tech_stack": [
            "PyTorch: Industrial-strength deep learning framework required for implementing Transformer architectures.",
            "Transformers: Essential library providing pre-trained models for state-of-the-art text processing.",
            "FastAPI: High-performance web framework used to deploy NLP models as services.",
            "MLflow: Critical tool for experiment tracking, model versioning, and lifecycle management.",
            "Docker: Standard containerization tool ensuring consistent deployment across various production environments."
        ],
        "implementation_steps": [
            "Collect a domain-specific corpus using advanced data mining techniques to ensure diverse and relevant textual datasets.",
            "Fine-tune a BERT-based model using PyTorch and HuggingFace to extract complex entities and their relational attributes.",
            "Construct a social network graph using NetworkX to analyze the centrality and themes of extracted interactions.",
            "Wrap the inference logic in an asynchronous FastAPI service to handle real-time NLP requests efficiently.",
            "Integrate an ethics-focused bias detection layer and containerize the stack with Docker for scalable deployment."
        ]
    }
}
